title: orobanche alba var. hellebori
intro: Orobanche alba var. hellebori, commonly known as hellebore broomrape, is a parasitic plant species belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, Orobanche alba var. hellebori is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not widely documented and should be approached with caution.
